originalTitle: Invincible VS - DLC 1 Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
content: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/invincible-vs/ The battle for Season One begins June 30th! Fight with Universa and The Immortal. Flex new premium and earnable skins. Play Endless Arcade mode, and much more. Don't get too comfortable though, Angstrom Levy is waiting... The Immortal & Universa join Invincible VS on June 30th as the first two fighters of the Year 1 Character Pass. Come to our booth at Evo France and experience the 3rd DLC fighter: Angstrom Levy. #ps5 #ps5games #invinciblevs Rated Mature
chineseContent: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/invincible-vs/ 第一季之战将于 6 月 30 日开始！与宇宙和不朽者战斗。 Flex 新的优质且可赚取的皮肤。畅玩无尽街机模式等等。不过，别太放心，Angstrom Levy 正在等待……Immortal 和 Universa 将于 6 月 30 日加入 Invincible VS，成为第一年角色通行证的前两名战士。欢迎来到我们在 Evo France 的展位，体验第三款 DLC 战斗机：Angstrom Levy。 #ps5 #ps5games #invinciblevs 评级成熟
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
